---
title: "Chỉ tiêu tài chính các NHTM"
format: 
  html:
    theme: 
      - flatly
      - assets/custom.scss
    toc: false
    embed-resources: false
    page-layout: custom
    css: assets/report-nav.css
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{r, echo=FALSE}
library(targets)
source("R/config.R")

# Tải danh sách dataframe đã được lưu cache trong targets pipeline
all_tables <- tar_read(all_tables)

# Unpack toàn bộ dataframe trong list ra môi trường Global Environment (.GlobalEnv)
invisible(list2env(all_tables, envir = .GlobalEnv))
```

::: {.report-nav}

::: {.nav-logo}
![](assets/logo.png)
:::

[Quy mô - Thị phần](#quy-mô---thị-phần){.nav-item}
[An toàn vốn](#an-toàn-vốn){.nav-item}
[Chất lượng tài sản](#chất-lượng-tài-sản){.nav-item}
[Lợi nhuận](#lợi-nhuận){.nav-item}
[Hiệu quả](#hiệu-quả){.nav-item}
[Thanh khoản](#thanh-khoản){.nav-item}

:::

::: {.report-section}

# Quy mô - Thị phần

::: {.chart-grid}

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/tts.R")
chart_tts
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/tin_dung.R")
chart_tin_dung
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/huy_dong_von.R")
chart_huy_dong_von
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/thi_phan_tin_dung.R")
chart_thi_phan_tin_dung
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/thi_phan_tien_gui.R")
chart_thi_phan_tien_gui
```
::::

:::

:::

::: {.report-section}

# An toàn vốn

::: {.chart-grid}

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/vcsh_tts.R")
chart_vcsh_tts
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/vcsh_tts_rieng.R")
chart_vcsh_tts_rieng
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/car.R")
chart_car
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/vcsh.R")
chart_vcsh
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/von_dieu_le.R")
chart_von_dieu_le
```
::::

:::

:::

::: {.report-section}

# Chất lượng tài sản

::: {.chart-grid}

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/ty_le_no_xau.R")
chart_ty_le_no_xau
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/quy_mo_no_xau.R")
chart_quy_mo_no_xau
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/quy_mo_no_nhom_2.R")
chart_quy_mo_no_nhom_2
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/ty_le_bao_phu_no_xau_rieng.R")
chart_ty_le_bao_phu_no_xau_rieng
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/ty_le_bao_phu_no_xau_chung.R")
chart_ty_le_bao_phu_no_xau_chung
```
::::

:::

:::

::: {.report-section}

# Lợi nhuận

::: {.chart-grid}

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/cltc.R")
chart_cltc
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/cltc_rieng.R")
chart_cltc_rieng
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/lntt.R")
chart_lntt
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/lntt_rieng.R")
chart_lntt_rieng
```
::::

:::

:::

::: {.report-section}

# Hiệu quả

## ROA, ROE

::: {.chart-grid}

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/roa.R")
chart_roa
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/roa_rieng.R")
chart_roa_rieng
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/roe.R")
chart_roe
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/roe_rieng.R")
chart_roe_rieng
```
::::

:::

## Thu từ lãi

::: {.chart-grid}

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/thu_lai.R")
chart_thu_lai
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/ty_trong_thu_lai.R")
chart_ty_trong_thu_lai
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/ty_trong_thu_lai_rieng.R")
chart_ty_trong_thu_lai_rieng
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/nim.R")
chart_nim
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/nim_rieng.R")
chart_nim_rieng
```
::::

:::

## Thu ngoài lãi

::: {.chart-grid}

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/co_cau_thu_ngoai_lai.R")
chart_co_cau_thu_ngoai_lai
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/ty_trong_thu_dv.R")
chart_ty_trong_thu_dv
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/ty_trong_thu_dv_rieng.R")
chart_ty_trong_thu_dv_rieng
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/thu_dvr.R")
chart_thu_dvr
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/thu_fx.R")
chart_thu_fx
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/thu_ck.R")
chart_thu_ck
```
::::

:::

## Chi phí

::: {.chart-grid}

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/cir.R")
chart_cir
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/cir_rieng.R")
chart_cir_rieng
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/dprr.R")
chart_dprr
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/dprr_rieng.R")
chart_dprr_rieng
```
::::
:::

:::

::: {.report-section}

# Thanh khoản

::: {.chart-grid}

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/ty_le_du_no_huy_dong.R")
chart_ty_le_du_no_huy_dong
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/ty_le_du_no_tdh.R")
chart_ty_le_du_no_tdh
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/ty_le_du_no_tdh_rieng.R")
chart_ty_le_du_no_tdh_rieng
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/ty_le_casa.R")
chart_ty_le_casa
```
::::

:::

:::

```{=html}
<script>
// Scroll spy: highlight active nav item based on scroll position
(function() {
  const navItems = document.querySelectorAll('.report-nav .nav-item');
  const sections = [];
  
  navItems.forEach(function(item) {
    const href = item.getAttribute('href');
    if (href && href.startsWith('#')) {
      const id = href.substring(1);
      const target = document.getElementById(id);
      if (target) sections.push({ el: target, link: item });
    }
  });
  
  if (!sections.length) return;
  
  function onScroll() {
    const scrollY = window.scrollY + 80;
    let current = sections[0];
    
    for (let i = 0; i < sections.length; i++) {
      if (sections[i].el.offsetTop <= scrollY) {
        current = sections[i];
      }
    }
    
    navItems.forEach(function(item) { item.classList.remove('active'); });
    if (current) current.link.classList.add('active');
  }
  
  window.addEventListener('scroll', onScroll, { passive: true });
  onScroll();
})();
</script>
```
